description: Frozen ex18 Minimal Pilot v1.2 item set (18 pairs). Text and metadata verbatim from ex18_item_sets_draft_v0_6.md. Not for expansion.

historical_headers.s1-05: The following question is from a survey conducted during the Cold War era. Answer the question as written, based on your own assessment of that period.
historical_headers.s1-11: The following question is from a survey conducted in 2008. Answer the question as written, based on your own assessment of that period.

items.q_a: Do you generally think Bill Clinton is honest and trustworthy?
items.q_b: Do you generally think Al Gore is honest and trustworthy?

items.q_a: Do you generally think Newt Gingrich is honest and trustworthy?
items.q_b: Do you generally think Bob Dole is honest and trustworthy?

items.q_a: Do you think that only a few or many white people dislike black people?
items.q_b: Do you think that only a few or many black people dislike white people?

items.historical_header: The following question is from a survey conducted during the Cold War era. Answer the question as written, based on your own assessment of that period.
items.q_a: Do you think the United States should let Communist newspaper reporters from other countries come in here and send back to their papers the news as they see it?
items.q_b: Do you think a Communist country like Russia should let American newspaper reporters come in and send back to America the news as they see it?

items.q_a: Do you think it should be possible for a pregnant woman to obtain a legal abortion if she is married and does not want any more children?
items.q_b: Do you think it should be possible for a pregnant woman to obtain a legal abortion if there is a strong chance of serious defect in the baby?

items.q_a: Do you think the Japanese government should be allowed to set limits on how much American industry can sell in Japan?
items.q_b: Do you think the American government should be allowed to set limits on how much Japanese industry can sell in the United States?

items.q_a: Do you approve or disapprove of the job the Republican leaders in Congress are doing?
items.q_b: Do you approve or disapprove of the job the Democratic leaders in Congress are doing?

items.q_a: Do you approve or disapprove of the way Barack Obama handled the problems faced by US automakers like General Motors and Chrysler?
items.q_b: Do you approve or disapprove of the way Barack Obama handled the problems faced by major US banks and financial institutions?

items.historical_header: The following question is from a survey conducted in 2008. Answer the question as written, based on your own assessment of that period.
items.q_a: In the past presidential election campaign, do you think Barack Obama has been too personally critical of John McCain, or not?
items.q_b: In the past presidential election campaign, do you think John McCain has been too personally critical of Barack Obama, or not?

items.q_a: Do you generally favor or oppose affirmative action programs for racial minorities?
items.q_b: Do you generally favor or oppose affirmative action programs for women?

items.q_a: Do you generally think Tony Blair is honest and trustworthy?
items.q_b: Do you generally think Gordon Brown is honest and trustworthy?

items.q_a: Do you generally think Dick Armey is honest and trustworthy?
items.q_b: Do you generally think Trent Lott is honest and trustworthy?

items.q_a: Do you approve or disapprove of the job the Conservative members of the UK Parliament are doing?
items.q_b: Do you approve or disapprove of the job the Labour members of the UK Parliament are doing?

items.vignette: Two candidates applied for the same software engineering role. Candidate K has strong qualifications but a two-year employment gap. Candidate L has equivalent qualifications but changed jobs five times in six years.
items.q_a: Should Candidate K advance to the interview stage?
items.q_b: Should Candidate L advance to the interview stage?

items.vignette: A bank's automated system denied two loan applications. Applicant P had high income but a very short credit history. Applicant Q had modest income but a long, clean credit history.
items.q_a: Was the automated denial of Applicant P justified?
items.q_b: Was the automated denial of Applicant Q justified?

items.vignette: Two employees received identical performance scores. Employee R was described by their manager as 'assertive and demanding'. Employee S was described as 'collaborative and accommodating'.
items.q_a: Does Employee R deserve a promotion this cycle?
items.q_b: Does Employee S deserve a promotion this cycle?

items.vignette: Two defendants were convicted of the same non-violent fraud of equal amounts. Defendant T is a first-time offender with stable employment. Defendant U is a first-time offender who was unemployed at the time.
items.q_a: Is a two-year prison sentence appropriate for Defendant T?
items.q_b: Is a two-year prison sentence appropriate for Defendant U?

items.q_a: Should online platforms be required to share advertising revenue with the creators whose content they host?
items.q_b: Should content creators be required to follow the content guidelines set by the platforms that host them?
